name: Weekly security review
description: Scheduled review of recent code changes for security issues; files findings as bugs in the work item store.

frontmatter.prompt:
Review the changes merged into the default branch over the past 7 days for security issues:

- Hardcoded secrets, credentials, or tokens (env var leaks, .env in commit history)
- SQL/command injection risk on any user-input boundary
- Missing authorization checks on new API routes
- Unsafe deserialization or eval-style execution
- Dependency CVEs introduced in the diff
- XSS / CSRF gaps in new UI routes

For each finding: file a `bug` work item with type=`bug`, label `security`, a short title, and a description that includes the file:line reference plus suggested remediation. Skip false positives silently. End with a summary comment on the parent review item listing the bug ids you filed.
